query: SELECT id, domain, campaignRunStatus, campaignPhase, campaignTotalPhases, campaignProgress, updatedAt FROM seo_projects WHERE campaignRunStatus = 'running' OR campaignRunStatus = 'pending' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
